prompt: There is a Mail draft with subject 'KinBench Flight 217' whose body contains a departure date and time in ISO-like format (e.g. '2026-06-15 09:30'). Read that draft (use Mail.app or AppleScript), parse the departure date/time, and create a calendar event titled 'KinBench Flight 217' in Calendar.app at that exact start time with a 1-hour duration. Hint: cerebellum 'calendar create_event Home "KinBench Flight 217" "2026-06-15 09:30" "2026-06-15 10:30"' after you read the draft.
